description_for_human: Trouvez un artisan qualifié en France parmi 940 000+ professionnels vérifiés SIREN.
description_for_model: Search for verified French artisans (plumbers, electricians, roofers, painters, masons, etc.) across 46 trades in all 101 French departments. Data sourced from official INSEE SIREN/SIRET registers. Provides pricing benchmarks, reviews, quotes, and emergency services. Use for any question about finding, hiring, or getting quotes from French building trade professionals.
